text.title: Helm Basics Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `Helm Basics` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: scaffold
step.action: Run `helm create` skeleton; replace stub templates with real ones.

step.name: values-design
step.action: Promote env-dependent fields to values; create per-env files; write schema.

step.name: dependencies
step.action: Declare in `dependencies`; run `helm dependency update`; commit lockfile.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run validator + `helm lint` + `helm template > /tmp/render.yaml`; review render.
